# NONE

**Enumeration Case**

Deletes a source record when the target record is deleted.

## Declaration

```swift
const String NONE;
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CloudKit/CKRecord/ReferenceAction] in CloudKit Framework Reference.

## Enumeration Cases

- **DELETE_SELF**: No action when a referenced record is deleted.
